chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1326 of 2023 Hafiz Qazi Abdul Rehman...............v..........Federation of Pakistan & others AND C.P.No.D-5586 of 2023 Abdul Sammad Jakhro & another.........v.........Federation of Pakistan & another --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 13.01.2025 Mr.Muhammad Ramzan, Advocate for the Petitioners in both petitions. Mr.Altaf Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Asghar Ali Khan, Advocate for Respondent (Pakistan Steel Mills) ---- These petitions seeking regularization of petitioners in Pakistan Steel Mills (Respondent). Learned counsel for the petitioners was asked to demonstrate any subsisting relationship / contract between the petitioners and the respondent, but he unable to do so. Learned counsel for the petitioners was also asked to demonstrate the law under which the regularization sought could be sanctioned; once again he remained unable to assist this Court. In mutatis mutandis application of the ratio illumined vide judgments of Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan reported as 2024 SCMR 527 (Vice Chancellor Agriculture University Peshawar & Others vs. Muhammad Shafiq & Others), Full bench of this Court in Muhammad Arif vs. Federation of Pakistan (CPD 875 of 2020 and connected petitions) judgment dated 2.04.2024 and Division Bench of this Court reported as 2024 P.L.C. (C.S) 1487 (Mumtaz Ali Panhwar & Others vs. Province of Sindh & Others) these petitions are found to be not maintainable, hence, dismissed.

Federation of Pakistan (CPD 875 of 2020 and connected petitions) judgment dated 2.04.2024 and Division Bench of this Court reported as 2024 P.L.C. (C.S) 1487 (Mumtaz Ali Panhwar & Others vs. Province of Sindh & Others) these petitions are found to be not maintainable, hence, dismissed. Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected petition. Judge Judge nasir`
